title: anisophyllum scordiifolium
intro: Anisophyllum scordiifolium, also known as Wild Marjoram or Sweet Marjoram, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Anisophyllum scordiifolium include relief from digestive issues, reduced anxiety and stress, and improved respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Anisophyllum scordiifolium can be found in the form of teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health concerns.
